requirements.title: Self-registration (email/password/username)
Unique email/username; username immutable; no email verification
Sign in / sign out / persistent login

bugs.description: Sign-out uses Identity default /logout; requirement says sign-out must log out only the current browser session. Bearer-token Identity API does not maintain multi-session server-side state, so 'other sessions' are not explicitly tracked/invalidated - may or may not satisfy the per-session requirement depending on token expiry behaviour.

requirements.title: Password reset and password change

bugs.description: Password reset exists via Identity API and a ResetPassword/ForgotPassword page; however default IEmailSender is a DevEmailSender that only logs the reset link - reset email is not actually sent unless SMTP provider is configured.

No dedicated in-app 'change password while logged in' UI visible under ProfilePage or elsewhere in FE/src/features; Identity endpoint manage/info is hidden from swagger, leaving change-password inaccessible to end users.

requirements.title: Account deletion cascades to owned rooms/messages/files; other memberships removed

bugs.description: MeController exposes DELETE /api/me calling ProfileService.DeleteAccountAsync, but backend does not expose attachment-file cleanup service and there is no FilesController (see 2.6.4) - cascading deletion of files on disk is uncertain.

requirements.title: Presence states: online / AFK / offline
AFK rule: 1 minute of no interaction
Multi-tab presence (BroadcastChannel dedup)
Active sessions list with per-session logout

bugs.description: No SessionsController in BE/Web/Controllers, no ISessionService in Application/Abstractions, and no Sessions page in FE/src/features. Requirement 2.2.4 and wireframe top-nav 'Sessions' entry are entirely absent.

requirements.title: Friend list
Send friend request by username or from room user list, optional text

bugs.description: POST /api/friends/requests accepts username + optional message, so 'by username' is covered. There is no UI affordance to send a friend request from a chat room user list (RightSidebar/ChatWindow do not render a member list with per-user actions).

requirements.title: Friendship confirmation
Remove friend

bugs.description: FriendsController has no DELETE endpoint for removing a friend; FriendList.tsx has no Remove button. Users cannot un-friend.
No endpoint to reject an incoming friend request - FE offers only Accept or Block.

requirements.title: User-to-user ban (block)

bugs.description: Block/Unblock endpoints exist but requirement mandates that existing personal message history becomes read-only/frozen and that personal chat is terminated. MessageService.SendMessageAsync only checks RoomBan, not UserBlock, so a blocked user's direct-chat room is not verifiably frozen on send.

requirements.title: Personal messaging only between friends & not blocked

bugs.description: DirectChatService.OpenOrCreate does not enforce friendship. Any authenticated user can open a direct chat with any username (source: DirectChatsController, DirectChatService).

requirements.title: Any user may create a chat room
Room properties: name/desc/visibility/owner/admins/members/banned; unique names
Public rooms catalog with search and member counts
Private rooms (invite-only, hidden from catalog)

bugs.description: RoomService.ListPublicRoomsAsync correctly filters out private rooms, but there is no invite system implemented: no RoomInvitation endpoints in RoomsController and no UI to invite users (see 2.4.9). Private rooms can only be joined by becoming a member through unknown means.

requirements.title: Join/leave rooms; owner cannot leave; owner can only delete

bugs.description: RoomService implements CreateRoomAsync and JoinRoomAsync, but Leave is not implemented. There is no LeaveRoom method in RoomService and no /leave endpoint in RoomsController.

requirements.title: Room deletion cascades messages, files, images

bugs.description: Delete-room is not implemented: no DeleteRoomAsync in RoomService, no DELETE endpoint in RoomsController, despite Room entity having DeletedAt soft-delete column. Owners cannot delete their own rooms.

requirements.title: Owner & admin roles and moderation actions

bugs.description: No admin moderation endpoints exist. RoomsController lacks MakeAdmin, RemoveAdmin, RemoveMember, BanMember, UnbanMember, ListBanned. RoomService implements none of these, so requirement 2.4.7 is entirely absent from the backend.

requirements.title: Room ban: removal == ban; banned user cannot rejoin

bugs.description: JoinRoomAsync checks RoomBan on join (good), but there is no way to create a RoomBan - no admin API exists. RoomBan entity is declared and queried but never inserted by application code.

requirements.title: Private room invitations

bugs.description: RoomInvitation entity exists but there is no API to create, list, accept or reject invitations. No UI invite dialog in FE/src/features/rooms.

requirements.title: Room and personal chats share the same model/features
Messages: text, multiline, emoji, attachments, replies; <=3KB UTF-8

bugs.description: Attachments are not implemented: no AttachmentsController, and MessageComposer.tsx paste handler explicitly contains a placeholder comment 'attachment upload placeholder - currently just show filename' that inserts '[attach: name]' into text. There is no explicit attach button.
No emoji picker UI in MessageComposer (emoji can still be typed via OS). Wireframe shows a dedicated emoji button.

requirements.title: Reply/reference to another message, visually quoted
Edit own message; 'edited' indicator
Delete message (author or room admin)

bugs.description: MessageService.DeleteMessage must allow room admins in room chats. Without an admin management system in place (req 2.4.7), admin-driven deletion has no test path even if the service-level check exists.

requirements.title: Persistent ordered history with infinite scroll; offline delivery
Supported attachments: images and files

bugs.description: No AttachmentsController exists; LocalFileStorage is wired but never invoked by any controller/service. Attachment upload/download paths are entirely missing end-to-end.

requirements.title: Upload via button or paste

bugs.description: MessageComposer lacks an attach button; paste handler merely inserts filename text, does not upload.

requirements.title: Preserve original filename; optional comment

bugs.description: Attachment entity defines FileName and Comment columns but no upload endpoint exists to populate them.

requirements.title: Access control for files (members only)

bugs.description: No FilesController; no authenticated download endpoint. Files cannot be served and access control is moot.

requirements.title: File persistence after access loss

bugs.description: Cannot be verified - attachments are entirely unimplemented.

requirements.title: Unread indicators near rooms/contacts

bugs.description: Unread badges are rendered on room items in RightSidebar and in TopNav aggregate, but FriendList.tsx does not render unread badges next to contacts.

requirements.title: Low latency presence updates
Capacity: 300 users, 1000 per room, unlimited rooms

bugs.description: InMemoryPresenceTracker is single-process; horizontal scaling for 300 users is feasible on one node but would break with multiple API instances.

requirements.title: Performance targets (3s message delivery, 2s presence, 10k history)
Persistence with infinite scroll
File storage on local FS; <=20MB file / <=3MB image

bugs.description: LocalFileStorage abstraction exists but no endpoint enforces the 20MB / 3MB limits. Feature cannot be exercised.

requirements.title: No inactivity logout; persist login; multi-tab
Consistency of membership/bans/file access/history/roles

bugs.description: Admin/owner permissions and room bans cannot be exercised because admin endpoints are missing (see 2.4.7, 2.4.8).

requirements.title: Classic layout: top menu, center chat, input bottom, right sidebar
Rooms/contacts on right; accordion after enter; members panel on right

bugs.description: No members/context panel is rendered on the right side when a room is open. ChatWindow.tsx only renders header + MessageList + MessageComposer; no members list, presence column, or room-info panel exists (wireframe shows Room info, Owner, Admins, Members, Invite user, Manage room).
Sidebar shows 'Rooms' and 'Direct Messages' but not separate 'Public Rooms'/'Private Rooms' sections and no integrated 'Contacts' list; wireframe expects combined rooms + contacts column with search.

requirements.title: Auto-scroll to bottom; infinite scroll up; no forced autoscroll when scrolled up
Message composer: multiline, emoji, attachments, replies

bugs.description: Attachment button missing; emoji picker missing (see 2.5.2).

requirements.title: Unread indicators near room and contact names

bugs.description: Unread indicators exist on rooms but not on contacts (see 2.7.1).

requirements.title: Admin UI (ban/unban, remove, manage admins, view banned, delete msgs/room)

bugs.description: No admin UI exists: no Manage Room modal, no Members/Admins/Banned/Invitations/Settings tabs (as shown in wireframe), no delete-room action. Corresponds to missing BE endpoints (2.4.6, 2.4.7, 2.4.8, 2.4.9).

requirements.title: Advanced: Jabber/XMPP federation

bugs.description: BE/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md explicitly marks XMPP out of scope for v1. No Jabber admin dashboard or federation stats UI.

wireframes.screen_name: Auth landing (logo + Sign in / Register buttons)

bugs.description: FE routes render Sign-In and Register pages directly, there is no distinct landing header bar showing LOGO with Sign in / Register links when unauthenticated.

wireframes.screen_name: Sign In form (email, password, keep-me-signed-in, forgot link)
Register form (email, username, password, confirm password)
Top nav (ChatLogo | Public Rooms | Private Rooms | Contacts | Sessions | Profile | Sign out)

bugs.description: TopNav only has Public / Contacts / Profile links. Missing 'Private Rooms' entry and 'Sessions' entry; 'Sign out' is inside the profile dropdown rather than top-level (acceptable), but Sessions is entirely absent (matches missing req 2.2.4).

wireframes.screen_name: Main chat 3-column layout (left sidebar rooms+contacts, center chat, right members/context)

bugs.description: Right-side Members / Context panel with Room info, Owner, Admins list, Members list with presence, Invite user button, Manage room button is entirely missing in ChatWindow.
Sidebar lacks a search input for rooms and lacks combined Contacts section; wireframe groups Public Rooms and Private Rooms explicitly, while FE just shows 'Rooms' and 'Direct Messages'.
No 'Create room' button in the sidebar; CreateRoomDialog component exists but is only invoked from PublicCatalog.

wireframes.screen_name: Message composer bar (emoji, attach, replying-to, multiline input, send)

bugs.description: Emoji button and Attach button are absent. Only a plain textarea + Send button is rendered. 'Replying to' pill is present.

wireframes.screen_name: Manage Room modal - Members tab (list with Make admin/Remove admin/Ban/Remove)

bugs.description: No Manage Room modal exists. No component under FE/src/features/rooms implements member management.
Not implemented - no admin management UI.

wireframes.screen_name: Manage Room modal - Banned users tab

bugs.description: Not implemented - no banned-users UI and no backend endpoints to populate it.
Not implemented - no RoomInvitation endpoints and no UI.

wireframes.screen_name: Manage Room modal - Settings tab (name, description, visibility, Save, Delete room)

bugs.description: No settings UI and no UpdateRoom or DeleteRoom endpoints in RoomService/RoomsController.

all_bugs.description: Delete-room is not implemented: no DeleteRoomAsync in RoomService, no DELETE endpoint in RoomsController, despite Room entity having DeletedAt soft-delete column. Owners cannot delete their own rooms.
No admin moderation endpoints exist. RoomsController lacks MakeAdmin, RemoveAdmin, RemoveMember, BanMember, UnbanMember, ListBanned. Requirement 2.4.7 is entirely absent from the backend.
No AttachmentsController exists; LocalFileStorage is wired but never invoked. Attachment upload/download paths are entirely missing end-to-end.
No admin UI exists: no Manage Room modal, no Members/Admins/Banned/Invitations/Settings tabs, no delete-room action.
No Manage Room modal exists. No member management component under FE/src/features/rooms.
No room settings UI and no UpdateRoom or DeleteRoom endpoints.
No dedicated in-app 'change password while logged in' UI; Identity manage/info endpoints are hidden from swagger and there is no FE affordance.
Account deletion path does not verifiably cascade attachment files on disk (no FilesController/attachment service).
Active sessions list with per-session logout is entirely missing (no SessionsController, no Sessions page).
No endpoint or UI to remove a friend; FriendList.tsx only offers Accept/Block/Message actions.
User-to-user block does not freeze existing direct-chat messages: MessageService.SendMessageAsync checks RoomBan but not UserBlock.
DirectChatService.OpenOrCreate does not enforce friendship; any user can DM any username.
No invite/accept flow for private rooms. RoomInvitation entity exists but has no endpoints or UI.
Leave-room is not implemented: no LeaveRoom method or /leave endpoint.
RoomBan entity is read but never written; no admin API creates bans.
Private-room invitations not implemented.
Attachments not implemented in MessageComposer; paste handler inserts filename text and there is no explicit upload button.
No attach button / upload mechanism in the UI; paste handler is a placeholder.
Attachment metadata (original filename, optional comment) cannot be captured because no upload endpoint exists.
No authenticated file-download endpoint (FilesController missing); access control not enforced.
File size limits (20MB file / 3MB image) not enforceable because there is no upload endpoint.
Admin/owner permissions and room bans cannot be exercised because their endpoints are missing.
Right-side Members/Context panel (Room info, Owner, Admins, Members with presence, Invite user, Manage room) is entirely missing from ChatWindow.
Composer lacks emoji and attach buttons (only textarea + send).
TopNav missing 'Private Rooms' and 'Sessions' entries.
Right-side members/context panel missing in chat 3-column layout.
Composer bar missing emoji and attach buttons.
Admins tab of Manage Room modal not implemented.
Banned users tab of Manage Room modal not implemented.
Invitations tab of Manage Room modal not implemented.
Sign-out cannot verifiably log out only the current browser session under Identity bearer-token flow; other sessions are not tracked.
Password reset email is not actually sent in default dev configuration (DevEmailSender only logs the link).
No UI affordance to send a friend request from a chat room user list.
No endpoint to reject an incoming friend request.
Admin-driven message deletion cannot be exercised because no admin management exists.
File persistence after access loss cannot be verified - attachments unimplemented.
Unread badges not rendered next to contacts in FriendList.tsx.
Sidebar lacks 'Public Rooms'/'Private Rooms' split, no search input, no integrated Contacts.
No 'Create room' button in the side sidebar; creation only from PublicCatalog.
Unread indicators next to contacts missing.
No emoji picker UI (emoji still typeable via OS).
InMemoryPresenceTracker is single-process; horizontal scaling would break presence.
Jabber/XMPP federation and admin dashboards not implemented (explicitly out of scope).
No distinct unauthenticated landing header with LOGO + Sign-in/Register buttons.
